WARNING: This team can severely walled when reaching Chapter 9 if you only use this team. So proceed with caution!!!

Content:
This is a not so detailed guide :Hehe:  about what you need to know about Jenkin how to pilot this comp in general. However, this guide is very specific with the team comp, but the comp itself is very accessible for all player if they decide to join the rat gang :Loading: .

For the time being I only played this comp for about 3 weeks but I've cleared the first 8 chapters of the game already. So for any missing information in the guide, I would like to expand it in the future with more tips and particular hard boss that might counter this team with further testing.

Thanks to anyone who read <:Emoji_AEL_K_08:1400771545370067118> 

Side note: this is a month old already so if you have any question regarding newer content feel free to ask

embeds.description: AN “UNDYING” rat Guide🐭 By Melwyn, UID: 100922715 Thanks Al the Tourist, Jynn, Goz, Rainscarlet for helping with information and/or support  -Unknown author- Introduction Jenkin, self proclaimed “Londinium’s Top Thief”, is an assault ultra awakener who can comfortably clear most of early to mi...

content:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/19oZAR-tf-J668M4lq8wX-SXCiTLlIiqAvXgsAj7gp5g/edit?usp=sharing

After seeing a lot of questions over time on the subject and the difficulty some people I had getting to grips with the very fun Caro Realm, I wrote a guide to explain and cover most of the earlygame basics and hopefully help you progress through to the end of Chapter 6 and beyond!

**Contents:**
Full explanation of Blood Furnace, Embryo Fusion and Devour
A basic rundown on every single Caro Awakener released up until now
Earlygame Wheel of Destiny picks
Caro Chaos, Caro Aequor and Caro Ultra mini-rundown
Simple Teambuilding Guide
...and other little tips here and there.

Hope it helps! <:Emoji_TYS_O_08:1400771784982397049> 🩷
